title: deer-flow.cumulative.exit v1
description: Cumulative-synthesis middleware force-exited an agent thread — count reached the EXIT threshold and the agent was jumped to 'end'. Producer: backend/packages/harness/deerflow/agents/middlewares/cumulative_synthesis_middleware.py. PRODUCER NOTE: live producer emits unversioned channel name `deer-flow.cumulative.exit`; this schema is filed against the canonical versioned name and validates the same data block.

thread_id.description: LangGraph thread id that just exited

count.description: cumulative count at the moment of force-exit
